User Story: As a player I want to import the mcpack so textures apply in Bedrock
Expected Behaviour: Double-click or Open-in-Minecraft imports Cel_Band_Pack.mcpack without errors
Edge Cases: Duplicate import; wrong file type; MC < 1.21

User Story: As a player I want to import the mcpack so textures apply in Bedrock
Expected Behaviour: Pack appears in resource list as Cel Band Pack
Test Case Description: Verify pack name in MC resource picker

Test Case Description: Activate pack globally and load creative world

Expected Behaviour: World edit → Resource Packs → add Cel Band Pack
Test Case Description: Activate pack on single world only
